race.comment: WANDA GUNN (8) used the rails draw to advantage to get home last time at this track and distance (17.58) after charging straight to the lead, scoring by 4.5 lengths. Can make it two on the bounce. ROCKIN' PANAMA (1) turned in a modest effort most recently when eighth at this track over 300m behind Riverside Levi (18.33) in a Grade 5. Solid formlines coming through her last run. Likely to play a prominent role. TRALEE AIMEE (2) produced a modest effort most recently when sixth at this track over 300m behind Ocean's Pearl (17.95) in a Grade 5. The form out of last race has been strong. Great chance to atone. PARK KEY PAW (3) should be thereabouts despite an unplaced run here most recently.
